narrative: KTX Exchange announced it will be the first centralized exchange to list PRL spot ("tradable soon") — the loudest item in 124 tracked X mentions, alongside a perp venue adding PRL maker rebates. The bridge cleared balanced two-way flow: 6,292 PRL in and 6,474 PRL out over 24h, with custody steady at 765,453 PRL (~$402k) and both supply counters in exact agreement. Price eased -1.69% to $0.5256 on $18k DEX volume; network hashrate read 26.01 EH/s with the MinePRL pool reporting 14 active GPUs (24 yesterday). Core kept shipping: wallet 2.0.0 landed in pearl-research-labs/pearl, PIP-2 was finalized, and 34 commits landed across the four tracked repos in 7 days.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.network_hashrate_hps, network.height, network.chain_nbits, economics.active_gpus, economics.network_share) — pool snapshot generated 2026-06-12T00:00:11Z

anomalies: Balanced two-way throughput over the last 24h: 6,292 PRL deposited (13 mints) and 6,474 PRL redeemed (3 burns) — both directions clearing is the bridge working as designed.
Yesterday's ~244 PRL gap between /api/supply and custody totalSupplyGrains cleared within the day as expected — both counters read 759,591.17 WPRL exactly today.
Fast-lane usage reads 0% because this snapshot is taken moments after the daily 00:00 UTC window reset; the live Stats page shows intraday usage.

MinePRL pool reports 14 active GPUs (24 in the prior snapshot) and ~0.005% network share; network hashrate eased to 26.01 EH/s while block production stayed on cadence (height +863 since the prior pool snapshot).

social.summary: KTX Exchange announced it will be the first centralized exchange to list PRL spot, and a perp venue added a 5bps maker rebate for PRL orders — the first off-DEX market access for the asset. Pearl also featured in several curated lists of proof-of-useful-work projects, and a mining-channel video covering the audited Pearl wallets premiered. Scattered caution (token-unlock chatter) stayed isolated, with no coordinated criticism.

sample_tweets.snippet: KTX is proud to be the world's first exchange to list $PRL — $PRL spot will be tradable soon
we've adjusted the fee structure for $PRL — every $PRL perp limit order you place earns a 5bps maker rebate
Out now! Why Pearl ($PRL) disrupts the PoW & AI ecosystem — report covers accumulation and partnerships
Mentioned several protocols here, but please DYOR: @prlnet @nockchain @ambient_xyz @gonka_ai @quipnetwork @_Qubic_

sources: api.x.com/2/tweets/search/recent + /2/tweets/counts/recent (query: (@prlnet OR @pearlbridgexyz OR "$PRL") -is:retweet lang:en, last 24h — count includes some unrelated "PRL" acronym noise)

github.last_commit_msg: v0.4.3: fix multi-model re-audit findings C1-C8
chore(wallet,spv): bump wallet to 2.0.0 and derive neutrino UA from monorepo version (#176)
